summary: All packet findings were addressed with a structural rewrite of the communication spine: timeline continuity is now explicit and canon-consistent, notification-heavy mediation has been converted into live embodied conflict, mid-chapter escalation now advances through distinct irreversible costs, and the chapter exit lands immediate consequence on-page before close.
